Class Ennemi

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
public final class Ennemi extends Object
Represents an enemy unit in the dungeon. Manages statistics, status effects, and delegates combat logic to its behavior.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Ennemi(String name, int pvMax, int xpReward, EnemyBehavior behavior)
    Constructs a new enemy with specified statistics and behavior.

    Processes damage intake, considering protection and dodge effects.

    Triggers poison and decreases status stacks at the end of the turn.

    Triggers regeneration and burn effects at the start of the turn.

  • Constructor Details

    • Ennemi

      public Ennemi(String name, int pvMax, int xpReward, EnemyBehavior behavior)
      Constructs a new enemy with specified statistics and behavior.
      Parameters:
      name - the non-null name of the enemy.
      pvMax - the maximum health points (must be positive).
      xpReward - the experience points awarded upon defeat.
      behavior - the non-null AI behavior module.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name or behavior is null.

  • Method Details

    • choisirProchaineAction

      public EnemyAction choisirProchaineAction()
      Plans the next action for the current turn.
      Returns:
      the selected EnemyAction intent.

    • executerAction

      public void executerAction(Heros heros)
      Executes the announced action on the specified hero.
      Parameters:
      heros - the targeted hero.

    • recevoirDegats

      public void recevoirDegats(int amount)
      Processes damage intake, considering protection and dodge effects.
      Parameters:
      amount - the damage amount to receive.

    • gagnerProtection

      public void gagnerProtection(int amount)
      Adds protection points to the enemy.
      Parameters:
      amount - the quantity of protection to add.

    • addStatus

      public void addStatus(Effect effect, int stacks)
      Adds stacks of a status effect to the enemy.
      Parameters:
      effect - the non-null status effect type.
      stacks - the number of stacks to add.

    • getStatus

      public int getStatus(Effect effect)
      Retrieves the current stack count of a status effect.
      Parameters:
      effect - the non-null effect to check.
      Returns:
      the stack count, or 0 if absent.

    • triggerStartTurnEffects

      public void triggerStartTurnEffects()
      Triggers regeneration and burn effects at the start of the turn.

    • triggerEndTurnEffects

      public void triggerEndTurnEffects()
      Triggers poison and decreases status stacks at the end of the turn.

    • estVivant

      public boolean estVivant()
      Returns:
      true if health points are above zero.

    • getHp

      public int getHp()

    • getMaxHp

      public int getMaxHp()

    • getxpReward

      public int getxpReward()

    • getName

      public String getName()

    • getActionAnnoncee

      public EnemyAction getActionAnnoncee()

    • getProtection

      public int getProtection()
